proposal_text:
Title: Whispering City
Concept: Where Memories Define Reality, and Every Emotion Holds a Secret
Website Product Description: Step into a captivating modern world where your perceptions shape reality. Whispering City is a unique life simulation game intricately woven with an intriguing AI mystery. Immerse yourself in a vibrant city, engaging with characters whose pasts are shrouded in fragmented memories and unspoken emotions. Your journey will involve more than just daily life; it's about uncovering a profound secret by observing subtle emotional cues, making meaningful choices in dialogue, and piecing together the forgotten history of the city itself. What you discover about the past, the people around you, and a mysterious, potentially sentient AI, will redefine your understanding of connection and truth. Dive into a deeply emotional narrative, where every relationship emerges uniquely based on your actions, and embark on a thought-provoking mystery that promises to challenge everything you believe.

Title: Timeless Secrets: The Artifact Detective
Concept: Unveiling the true history of the world, one hidden artifact at a time.
Website Product Description: Step into the shoes of a brilliant historical detective in a game that challenges everything you thought you knew about the past. Your extraordinary mission is to delve beneath the surface of known history, unearthing a world brimming with hidden conspiracies, forgotten manipulations, and fantastical secrets that have been deliberately obscured for centuries. By meticulously examining seemingly ordinary relics – a faded map, an antique coin, a forgotten journal – you will piece together fragments of truth, connecting the dots that no one else has seen. Experience the profound thrill of intellectual discovery as your unique insights reveal grand, interwoven narratives stretching across time. This isn't about simply learning history; it's about actively uncovering the true, untold story of the world, making you the sole discoverer of profound truths that will reshape everything you thought you knew. Uncover secrets, rewrite the past, and claim your place as the ultimate truth-seeker.
